message:
bd-37a.9: Unit tests for VOI sampling & e-process testing

Integration test suite covering cross-module VOI + e-process behavior:

- VOI correctly skips low-information samples (high cost, converged posterior)
- VOI correctly triggers sampling under high uncertainty (low cost, uniform prior)
- E-process wealth accumulation under known signal (50% match vs 10% null)
- E-process type-I error control (500 trials under null, rate < 3*alpha)
- Assert voi.evaluate and eprocess.update spans with required fields
- Property-based: 1000-run null hypothesis rejection rate bounded by alpha
- Combined VOI+e-process coordinated workflow integration
- Determinism verification for both subsystems across repeated runs

16 integration tests, all passing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
